name: Forest
flavor_text: The overgrown wilderness teems with life evolved in the shadow of ruin—ferns tall as towers, dinosaurs older than memory, and plants that learned to hunt. The old world feeds the new.
art_prompt: A dense primordial forest sprawls across the landscape, ferns towering like columns beneath a hazy canopy. Crumbling stone structures—weathered walls and fractured pillars—emerge from the overgrown vegetation. Massive dinosaurs with dusty brown and slate-grey hides move through the undergrowth. Vines and predatory plants reclaim the ruins, blending ancient civilization with wild, untamed nature.. Stylized digital illustration, panoramic landscape, dramatic atmospheric perspective, concept-art establishing shot, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
design_notes: Basic land with set-themed flavor text (Haiku)
